reason: HARD BLOCKER #1 — explicit no-sponsorship. The role is legally ineligible for Jamie (requires H-1B sponsorship). Building/submitting would be pointless and waste runway.
blocker_quote_from_jd: This role is not eligible for employment-based immigration sponsorship. Applicants must be legally authorized to work in the United States without employer sponsorship, now or in the future.
ats_discovered: Not pursued past the JD — the LinkedIn public apply link is a signup wall; real ATS (likely Workday at russellinvestments careers) not opened because the hard blocker makes it moot.
fit_note: Title fit was strong (L&D + Talent Development sweet spot) and 6 USC alumni at the company; 5+ yr ask was a stretch (Jamie ~3). None of that matters given the explicit no-sponsor clause.
yoe_note: JD: '5+ years of experience in learning & development, HR, program coordination, or a related role' — STRETCH (Jamie ~3), but not the reason for skip.
h1b_cache_entry: Added to h1b_verified.md ❌ CONFIRMED NO H1B table (2026-06-14).
